description_long: This is a full-size mechanical keyboard with a sleek, rectangular black chassis and individually backlit keys that emit a vibrant green glow. The keycaps are slightly concave and feature clear, legible English characters, with a standard QWERTY layout including a numeric keypad on the right. The surface is smooth and hard, likely made from high-quality plastic, and the keyboard features a prominent brand logo at the center below the spacebar. The keys are raised above the main body, allowing for easy cleaning and tactile feedback. There are no visible cables or wireless receivers attached, and the keyboard appears to be in pristine, new condition.
description: A full-size black mechanical keyboard with green backlit keys, featuring a QWERTY layout and a numeric keypad. The surface is smooth and hard, with a prominent brand logo and no visible cables.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the slim, rectangular shape and the raised keycaps above the chassis.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the green backlighting and the depth of the keycaps across the keyboard.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the full QWERTY layout, numeric keypad, and the central brand logo below the spacebar.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view emphasizing the uniform backlighting and the arrangement of the keys.
